name: AMAZON COM INC
summary: Amazon.com, Inc. is a global technology and e-commerce company organized into three segments: North America, International, and Amazon Web Services (AWS). It operates online and physical retail stores, offers third-party seller services, and provides cloud computing services including compute, storage, database, analytics, and AI/ML through AWS. It also manufactures devices (Kindle, Fire TV, Echo, Ring), offers Amazon Prime subscriptions, produces media content, and provides advertising services.

products.name: Amazon Prime
products.description: Membership program offering fast free shipping, streaming of movies, series, live sports, and other benefits.

products.name: Amazon Web Services (AWS)
products.description: On-demand cloud services including compute, storage, database, analytics, AI and machine learning.

products.name: Kindle
products.description: Electronic reading device manufactured and sold by Amazon.

products.name: Fire Tablet
products.description: Tablet device manufactured and sold by Amazon.

products.name: Fire TV
products.description: Streaming media device manufactured and sold by Amazon.

products.name: Echo
products.description: Smart speaker device powered by Alexa voice assistant.

products.name: Ring
products.description: Smart home security device manufactured and sold by Amazon.

products.name: Blink
products.description: Smart home security camera device manufactured and sold by Amazon.

products.name: eero
products.description: Home mesh Wi-Fi device manufactured and sold by Amazon.

products.name: Alexa
products.description: Virtual assistant used across Amazon devices and apps for discovery and purchasing.

products.name: Amazon Advertising
products.description: Advertising services including sponsored ads, display, and video advertising for sellers, vendors, and publishers.

products.name: Amazon Career Choice
products.description: Education funding program for eligible Amazon employees; over 300,000 participants worldwide.
